anomalies.post: Day 4 - They Are Not A Stepping Stone
anomalies.note: Saves ran 4.6x the trailing-8-week median. The over-the-shoulder 'greeted by name' image drove saves, not likes - readers filing it to act on later. Recommend a Day-4-style creative in next week's plan.

anomalies.post: Day 2 - We Chased Scale And Almost Broke
anomalies.note: Impressions ran about half the trailing median. Likely a low-traffic Tuesday 8am slot, not a content issue (engagement rate on the impressions it did get was normal). No action; monitoring only.

summary: Strongest engagement week of the quarter. The 'first 100 customers' theme outperformed the trailing 8-week average on every platform, led by Instagram saves. Read-only report - no posting was performed and no publish run was blocked.
actionSuggestions: Repeat the Day-4 'named regular' visual angle; it drove the week's only strong-positive anomaly.
Test an earlier LinkedIn slot (7am ET) to recover Tuesday reach.
